name: 发送校验注册短信验证码

parameters.name: sql_data
parameters.value: {'mobile_code': "select mobile_code  from tz_sms_log where user_phone='${gen_unregister_phone}' order by rec_date desc limit 1;"}

parameters.name: case
parameters.value: {'id': 'register_002', 'title': '发送校验注册短信验证码', 'method': 'PUT', 'url': '/user/checkRegisterSms', 'header': {'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Accept-Language': 'zh'}, 'param': {'mobile': '${gen_unregister_phone}', 'validCode': '${mobile_code}'}, 'assertion': None, 'presql': {'mobile_code': "select mobile_code  from tz_sms_log where user_phone='${gen_unregister_phone}' order by rec_date desc limit 1;"}, 'extract_data': {'check_code': 'text'}, 'assert_db': None}
